productDisplayName: Nike Women's Air Max Excel Black Shoe
description: Originally designed as a cross training shoe, the nike Air Max Trainer Excel has become a big time favourite gym footwear. Replete with a meshed upper and cushioned footbed, and weighing all of about 280 grams, the nike Air Max Trainer Excel is an absolute comfort, maximizing workout sessions.Styled with an aesthetic appeal and engineered with comfort, the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel has a nearly meshed upper that ensures ample ventilation and breathability, keeping the feet dry and comfortable during those sweaty sessions. The uppers are constructed using synthetic overlays to ensure a lockdown Fit. Added to this is a lightly padded tongue and collar that ensures a comfortable, snug fit, while the lace-up system provides an even better snug and supportive fit. The lacing system is integrated with Nike’s revolutionary Flywire technology with its high strength thread work, like that of cables used in suspension bridges, constructed exactly at those places where the foot needs that extra support.Run on air even on rockThe forefoot inner sleeve is seamless and has an underlay support frame for that extra stability and comfort. The insole of the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel shoe has a textile lining that fits snugly around the foot, enhancing shock absorption and keeping the feet safe from impact. The shock absorption technology in the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel has a low profile phylon midsole that is employed with a 180° Max Air unit to provide optimal cushioning and impact protection. The comfort factor doesn’t end just here. The Phylite midsole and outsole are fused to reduce the overall weight.The outsole of the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel is constructed with siped flex grooves on the forefoot to provide that ultimate multi-directional flexibility, while the strategically placed rubber pods on the outsole enhance traction and durability, making this rubber outsole engineered shoe an absolute pleasure to wear during training sessions.Upper Mesh upper with supportive overlays for breathability and lockdown fit Lightly padded collar and tongue Textile lining with a cushioned footbed for added comfort Ultra-lightweight Flywire bundles are integrated with the lacing system for extra support Internal seamless forefoot inner sleeve Internal underlay support frame Midsole Internal underlay support frame Low-profile Phylon midsole with 180° visible Max Air sole unit for optimal cushioning and impact absorption Outsole Siped forefoot flex grooves for ultimate multi-directional flexibility Strategically placed rubber pods in the outsole for traction and durability Rubber outsole with enhanced traction patterns for better surface grip Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
